name: J1939ILBlockTxMessage
title: J1939ILBlockTxMessage
syntax: long J1939ILBlockTxMessage(dword pgn, dword destinationAddress, qword filterMask, qword filterValue); // form 1
description: Prevents transmitting of a message generated and sent by the interaction layer.
The message to block is specified by PGN, destination address and a part of the first eight data bytes.
To revert this command you can use J1939ILResetBlockedTxMessage or J1939ILResetAllBlockedTxMessages.

parameters.name: pgn
parameters.description: The message with this PGN shall be blocked.
